modal.title: Report a Bug
modal.description: File an issue on GitHub so we can investigate.
modal.titlePlaceholder: Brief summary (e.g. Sidebar collapses on resize)
modal.titleValidation: Title must be at least 3 characters
modal.descriptionPlaceholder: What were you doing? What did you expect? You can paste a screenshot here.
modal.truncationNotice: Description will be truncated to {{limit}} characters ({{excess}} chars will be omitted)
modal.screenshotTooLarge: Screenshot too large ({{size}} MB) — GitHub caps at 10 MB. Crop and try again.
